text.text: Love Craftsman American Tavern in Eagle River WI.  Today was a flight of beer from Blueberry Train Tribute Brewing in Eagle River,  Hughes crawler Stout from Fox River Oshkosh & a Campfire Old Fashioned with Smoked Maple Knob Creek Bourbon with toasted marshmallow and cinnamon.  Fish tacos and Mint Smash burger with tots were both excellent as well as our attentive server Susan.  Fun & delicious visit

originalText.text: Love Craftsman American Tavern in Eagle River WI.  Today was a flight of beer from Blueberry Train Tribute Brewing in Eagle River,  Hughes crawler Stout from Fox River Oshkosh & a Campfire Old Fashioned with Smoked Maple Knob Creek Bourbon with toasted marshmallow and cinnamon.  Fish tacos and Mint Smash burger with tots were both excellent as well as our attentive server Susan.  Fun & delicious visit

text.text: Such a great spot for supper! We popped in on a later Friday afternoon. Everything was amazing. They did say they were understaffed and getting a table might take a minute, we didn’t mind, we were just happy to be there! All of the design and decor added to a welcoming and rustic atmosphere. Once we got seated, it didn’t take more than 5 minutes, we had drinks right away. I had the love, Stella. It was super smooth. The cheese curds with the raspberry sauce was amazing. For supper we both had burgers! Everything was great! Our server was Brittney and she was so kind! I would 100% recommend anybody to go here and grab a bite to eat!

text.text:
This place has the energy. Such an eclectic experience. The details matter here… which means your drink may take a second, but it’s worth it.
The service at our table was a typical up north service. (Slower than normal.)
There are plenty of games whether you’re waiting for a table or just want to hang.
Food was great.

text.text: Loved the vibe of this converted space! Very elevated woodsy. The cocktails were superb, creative and tasty. The burgers were delicious. Great for a group or a date night!

originalText.text: Loved the vibe of this converted space! Very elevated woodsy. The cocktails were superb, creative and tasty. The burgers were delicious. Great for a group or a date night!

text.text: Outstanding lunch. Modern-vibe lunch spot in the heart of Eagle River. Stopped in here based on the good reviews and we weren't disappointed. From the top notch cocktails to the fresh ingredients in the food, this place knocked it out of the park. Plump, juicy burgers and loaded sandwiches, not to mention the largest portion of cheese curds I've ever seen as an appetizer! Excellent service, friendly and attentive but not overbearing. Even a proper shuffleboard available for a bit of fun. Would definitely recommend eating here if you're in town.

originalText.text: Outstanding lunch. Modern-vibe lunch spot in the heart of Eagle River. Stopped in here based on the good reviews and we weren't disappointed. From the top notch cocktails to the fresh ingredients in the food, this place knocked it out of the park. Plump, juicy burgers and loaded sandwiches, not to mention the largest portion of cheese curds I've ever seen as an appetizer! Excellent service, friendly and attentive but not overbearing. Even a proper shuffleboard available for a bit of fun. Would definitely recommend eating here if you're in town.

text.text: Stopped in on our way to Bond Falls. The place was packed, but we quickly got a table. I ordered a cranberry mule and it was delicious!  I got a second one, but I think that was actually the Cran-Apple, even better than the first!  Garlic cheese curds were great. I ordered a mushroom Swiss burger, which was good, but I would probably get something else next time. My boyfriend got the brisket Reuben and he said it was amazing. Our server was a true gem - it was so busy, but she was very attentive and made conversation with us. She had two long days ahead and then was heading on a well-deserved vacation!

originalText.text: Stopped in on our way to Bond Falls. The place was packed, but we quickly got a table. I ordered a cranberry mule and it was delicious!  I got a second one, but I think that was actually the Cran-Apple, even better than the first!  Garlic cheese curds were great. I ordered a mushroom Swiss burger, which was good, but I would probably get something else next time. My boyfriend got the brisket Reuben and he said it was amazing. Our server was a true gem - it was so busy, but she was very attentive and made conversation with us. She had two long days ahead and then was heading on a well-deserved vacation!

text.text:
We had the pleasure of eating there one evening during our kiddos track meet between their events. The service was top notch and she was extremely friendly and warm. The food was also flavorful and delicious, so it’s a top spot for us now when in the area.

We also just used them for catering for 100 servings with a combination of smoked brisket and pulled pork, along with their pepper slaw. The team was great when we picked it up and went above what was quoted to ensure the event was successful. As for the party - Everyone loved the food and asked where it was from.

Would definitely recommend for dining or catering needs.

text.text: Stopped in and enjoyed a coupla beers from their great tap list and had them toss in a pizza to go. The thin crust pizza was nice and crispy with plenty of toppings, including some really good chunks of sausage. The staff was friendly and attentive, and the place had that perfect up north vibe.

text.text:
Amazing all the way around. The food was so good. They even special made a fish sandwich for my daughter.
Bathroom is super clean.
Bri.. with the long hair with hair tinsel in it. Was an absolute sweetheart.
I’m the pictures below was a 2 pieces cod dinner with fries and my daughter had the fish sandwich with fries.
Nice size portions. And the clam chowder is to die for

text.text: Great service! Carly was absolutely amazing.  Our party  of 10 was seated right away on a Friday evening and had friendly, fast service.  Great fish fry and old fashioneds! Also loved the sweet potato fries and cheese curds.

text.text: Stopped by to grab a beer. Beers were amazing and the atmosphere was really cool. I imagine during prime tourist season this place is poppin. Definitely will return.

originalText.text: Stopped by to grab a beer. Beers were amazing and the atmosphere was really cool. I imagine during prime tourist season this place is poppin. Definitely will return.

text.text: Really great people, super kind. I tried their blackberry sour and it was really good. Also have a nice light beer, the pontoon light. They have pizza and a giant pretzel if you get hungry which is pretty yummy. Went on a Thursday and they had someone playing some live music. It was pretty cold when we went but they had some heaters around the bar. Highly recommend on a nice summer day to hang out and have some drinks.

text.text: Us Illinoisans have been coming up to Eagle River since our childhood days as it holds a special place in our hearts. Andy's Pontoon Saloon has made our visit's more memorable and enjoyable! The atmosphere is dynamic with great bands playing Wednesday - Sunday afternoons. We love their pizza! They serve Wisconsin craft beer's and I tried their Lite Pontoon Saloon beer and it tasted delicious! They also serve wines, seltzers, NA beer & soda's. They have  humongous pretzels also. The outdoor beer garden is family & dog friendly and they have a pontoon boat you can chill out in or take pictures. You can play a game of bags and they also have trivia, bingo & yoga night. In the cooler months there is a fire pontoon outside you can sit by enjoying your drinks. When it's too cold to bare the outdoors the garage doors close and there's a cozy bar inside where you can listen to music or enjoy your favorite sports team playing a game of football. We all love Andy's Pontoon Saloon and will definitely be back! Fun times!!!

text.text: Recently, while attending the Burger Bash I visited Andy's Pontoon Saloon at 220 E Wall St, in  Eagle River, WI  They weren't serving food that day so I enjoyed my time at the bar. Even with the larger crowds on hand service was very good and returned to check on my satisfaction. The outdoor bar area is very spacious and looked new. I look forward to going back and trying the food especially when there is not an event going on

text.text:
Third visit in 2 years and getting even better! Live music midweek is a huge boost!

Came back a year later. Still awesome and fun. Live music, great beers, and the pretzel is excellent!

Very cool spot, especially when you need a break from shopping downtown Eagle River.

text.text: Me and my brother take a trip every year going to different places. Stopped in to Shotskis to check it out. Definitely a 5 star bar. Place is clean and has a nice atmosphere. The people were really friendly. The bartender (owner) was amazing. One of the best we have came across in our travels. Would recommend this place to everyone that comes to or lives in Eagle River. Definitely will stop in again if our travels allow. Thanks for making our night a great one .
